'''yawacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitess|rabbitess]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitess|rabbitess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yawacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæwæchæth|yæwæchæth]] || [[word:yæwæchæj|yæwæchæj]] || [[word:yæwæchæsh|yæwæchæsh]] || [[word:yæwæchæ|yæwæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawawachath|yawawachath]] || [[word:yawawachaj|yawawachaj]] || [[word:yawawachash|yawawachash]] || [[word:yawawacha|yawawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawachath|yawachath]] || [[word:yawachaj|yawachaj]] || [[word:yawachash|yawachash]] || [[word:yawacha|yawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawafchath|yawafchath]] || [[word:yawafchaj|yawafchaj]] || [[word:yawafchash|yawafchash]] || [[word:yawafchaf|yawafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yawachatha|yawachatha]] || [[word:yawachaja|yawachaja]] || [[word:yawachasha|yawachasha]] || [[word:yawachaka|yawachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yawachath|yawachath]] || [[word:yawachaj|yawachaj]] || [[word:yawachash|yawachash]] || [[word:yawacha|yawacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yawachathal|yawachathal]] || [[word:yawachajal|yawachajal]] || [[word:yawachashal|yawachashal]] || [[word:yawachakal|yawachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yawachathatha|yawachathatha]] || [[word:yawachajaja|yawachajaja]] || [[word:yawachashasha|yawachashasha]] || [[word:yawachaka|yawachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yawachathan|yawachathan]] || [[word:yawachajan|yawachajan]] || [[word:yawachashan|yawachashan]] || [[word:yawachakan|yawachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yawachathaoro|yawachathaoro]] || [[word:yawachajaoro|yawachajaoro]] || [[word:yawachashaoro|yawachashaoro]] || [[word:yawachakaoro|yawachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
